name: Grapefruit Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove seeds from grapefruit halves.
2. Cut around the edges and sections to loosen; remove centers.
3. Mix cereal, sugar and butter; spread on grapefruit.
4. Set oven control at broil.
5. Broil grapefruit 5 inches from heat for about 3 to 4 minutes, or until golden brown.
